title: Doped Horses - Faster, Enchantable & Configurable horses
description: Faster horses with enchantable horseshoes or depending  the block they're walking on ! You can even configure the step height !
body:
# 🐎 Doped Horses – Adaptive Speed & OP Horseshoes

Compatible with the great: [horseman](https://modrinth.com/mod/horseman)

🎥 [Watch the showcase]

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8kdB_y3QGIs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 🔧 Requirements

Make sure you have [Architectury](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api) + [MidnightLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/midnightlib). Both are needed for **Forge & Fabric**.

## 📚 Configuration

Server config isn’t in the GUI — check the [Wiki](https://github.com/GallonEmilien/DopedHorses/wiki)!

---

## 🚀 What’s This Mod?

**Doped Horses** makes your horses more fun and customizable:

### 🧲 Horseshoes

* Modify **jump, speed, step height, and armor**
* Can be enchanted with **Frost Walker / Soul Walker** → walk on water or run on soul sand

### 👩‍❤️‍👨 Dual Riding

* Supports **two players on one horse** (1.21.1 & [1.21.6-1.21.8] atm)

### 🏇 Adaptive Speed

* Horses run faster on certain blocks (easily configurable)
* Boost speed on blocks with **regex rules**  
  _Example:_ `.*concrete=0.7` → All concrete = +70% speed  

### ⚡ Instant Tame

* Right-click in Creative to tame instantly

### 🐴 Bonus

* Horses **stop moving when a saddle is equipped**

### 🔨 Recipes & Help

Check the [Wiki](https://github.com/GallonEmilien/DopedHorses/wiki) for crafting, setup, and tips!

---

## 💬 Need Help?

* Discord: **boucki**
* GitHub issues or comments

## Enjoy 

![Duo Ride](https://i.ibb.co/XZJvrNMT/2025-09-28-17-44-12.png)
